title: がっかりツインテール

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm supposed to meet with Daiwa Scarlet first
thing this morning, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is driving me crazy. No matter how many times I tie it, I can't get my hair right.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yes! There is! It has to be just like how my mom
taught me to do it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! I can't focus like this! I'll be back once I fix
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Daiwa Scarlet is unable to focus when
her hair isn't perfect.
